title: Service management API

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
Service management has a timeline feature that looks very similar to the “Emails and Activities” feature in the CRM.

Are there plans to expose similar APIs for creating Service activities etc via apps?

I have a phone system integration with customers asking if they can show calls for a service ticket in the service management product.
